subject: fix(content): auto-set visible: true when typing into uninitialized text element
body:
ContentTab's visibility check (visible !== false) treated undefined as
visible, showing the toggle as ON. But AdCanvas checked
cellText[id]?.visible directly, treating undefined as hidden. This meant
typing content into a new element showed the toggle as enabled while the
text didn't actually render on the canvas.

Now the textarea onChange writes visible: true to state when the element
has never had visibility explicitly set (visible === undefined). If the
user manually set visible: false, that choice is respected.

Tags: state, content, text, ux, bug
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: text-visibility-sync
